description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a sprawling, asymmetrical layout and multiple rooflines, including both flat and gabled sections. The structure is surrounded by a variety of trees and landscaping, with a driveway and a sidewalk leading up to the main entrance. The exterior features a mix of light and dark roofing materials, as well as several distinct sections that may represent different rooms or extensions. There is a visible patio or courtyard area with red tiling, and the property is bordered by a paved road. Windows are distributed irregularly across the facades, and a small garage or outbuilding is present on one side. The overall design suggests a modern or contemporary take on the classic bungalow style, with open outdoor spaces and integrated greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with multiple rooflines, landscaped surroundings, and an open courtyard area. The building features a mix of light and dark materials, irregular window placement, and a driveway connecting to a main road.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from above and slightly to the front, highlighting the main entrance, driveway, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a direct street-facing perspective, emphasizing the front facade, driveway, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a rear-side angle, revealing the back of the bungalow, additional landscaping, and the garage or outbuilding.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the property from the opposite street side, focusing on the rear courtyard, patio area, and more of the backyard landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and scattered windows
